message:
fix(durability): skip partial trailing symbols in erasure encoding instead of padding

source_symbols_from_bytes was using div_ceil to compute max_symbols,
causing a truncated trailing byte range to be zero-padded to symbol_size
and fed to the erasure codec as a source symbol. Padded partial symbols
produce corrupt repair blocks. Switch to truncating division so only
fully intact symbol-sized chunks are encoded. Also fixes metrics_snapshot
delegation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
